caption: The video depicts a group of children gathered around a signboard in what appears to be a rural or semi-urban area with modest, corrugated metal structures in the background. The signboard, featuring illustrations and text in French that translates to "Protect children against all forms of violence," is prominently displayed. The children, dressed in various colorful outfits, seem engaged with the content on the sign, possibly discussing or learning about its message. The setting suggests a community-focused initiative aimed at raising awareness about child protection. The ground is uneven and covered with dirt and rocks, indicating a less developed environment. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of community involvement and education in a resource-limited area.
